chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Expiation for Breaking a Vowed Fast

text: 2012 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ إِدْرِيسَ بْنِ زَيْدٍ وَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ إِدْرِيسَ عَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «تَصَدَّقَ عَنْ كُلِّ يَوْمٍ بِمُدٍّ مِنْ حِنْطَةٍ أَوْ شَعِيرٍ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2012 - In a narration from Idris ibn Zayd and Ali ibn Idris, it is reported from Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) that:
"He should give charity for each day with a mud (a measure) of wheat or barley."
